name: Dimensional Shackles
description: This iron shackle has a small door that opens and closes with a command word. You can take a Magic action to open the door, place a creature's limb through it, and close the door. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be bound by the shackle. The shackles can't be broken and can't be removed from the creature. The creature can take a Magic action to make a DC 20 Strength check to free itself.
properties: DC 15 Strength save to be bound
DC 20 Strength check to free self
Has a second shackle for anchoring

name: Dragon Scale Mail
description: This armor is made from the scales of a specific dragon type. You have Resistance to one damage type associated with that dragon type. You have Advantage on saving throws against the Frightened condition imposed by the dragon type's breath weapon.
properties: Advantage on saves vs dragon's breath weapon Frightened condition
Dragon types: Black (acid), Blue (lightning), Brass (fire), Bronze (lightning), Copper (acid), Gold (fire), Green (poison), Red (fire), Silver (cold), White (cold)

name: Driftglobe
description: This 6-inch-diameter sphere made of glass or crystal hovers in the air when you take a Magic action. It sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. You can take a Magic action to change the light to any color. The globe hovers up to 100 feet above you and follows you if you move more than 100 feet away.
properties: Hovers up to 100 feet above you
Change light color as Magic action

name: Dust of Disappearance
description: This small pouch contains dust that you can throw to make yourself and up to five other creatures Invisible for 1 hour or until the dust is shaken off. The effect ends if a creature attacks or casts a spell.
properties: Lasts 1 hour or until shaken off
Ends if creature attacks or casts spell

name: Dust of Dryness
description: This pouch contains dust that absorbs water. You can throw the dust on water to absorb up to 10 gallons. The dust can also be used to absorb moisture from the air in an area, creating a dry zone.
properties: Absorbs up to 10 gallons of water

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
description: This pouch contains dust that causes creatures to sneeze and choke when thrown. Creatures in a 20-foot-radius sphere must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be unable to take reactions until the end of their next turn.
properties: Creatures can't take reactions until end of next turn

name: Efreeti Bottle
description: This sealed brass bottle contains an Efreeti bound to serve the creature that releases it. The Efreeti can be summoned and commanded to perform tasks. It can cast spells and has various abilities. The Efreeti returns to the bottle after 1 hour or when its tasks are completed.
properties: Returns after 1 hour or task completion
Can be used to summon once per day

name: Elemental Gem
description: This gemstone contains a small Elemental creature of a specific type. While holding the gem, you can take a Magic action to break it, releasing the Elemental. The Elemental obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Elven Chain
description: This chain shirt is woven from mithral and elven steel. You have a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wearing this armor. If you are a Elf or Half-Elf, you can cast Invisibility (self only) with it once per day.
properties: Cast Invisibility (self only) once per day
Best for Elf or Half-Elf characters

name: Eversmoking Bottle
description: This ceramic bottle produces a cloud of smoke when its stopper is removed. The smoke fills a 30-foot cube and remains for 10 minutes. The bottle can be reclosed to stop the smoke from spreading.
properties: Can be reclosed to stop smoke

name: Eyes of Charming
description: While wearing these lenses, you can cast Charm Person (save DC 13) once per day by focusing your gaze on a creature within 30 feet of you.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
description: While wearing these lenses, you can see details as small as 1 inch across at ranges up to 30 feet. You have Advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks to find or examine secret doors, traps, or hidden objects.
properties: See details as small as 1 inch at 30 feet
Advantage on Investigation for secret doors/traps/hidden objects

name: Eyes of the Eagle
description: While wearing these lenses, your vision extends to 1 mile. You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
properties: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks relying on sight

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Abear)
description: This silver figurine of a bear can be activated by speaking its command word. The bear springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 15, 45 Hit Points, and can make two claw attacks (1d6+3 Bludgeoning damage each).

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Bull)
description: This silver figurine of a bull can be activated by speaking its command word. The bull springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 16, 67 Hit Points, and can gore or trample opponents.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ebony Eagle)
description: This ebony figurine of an eagle can be activated by speaking its command word. The eagle springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 16, 47 Hit Points, Fly Speed 60 feet, and can dive-bomb enemies.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Golden Snake)
description: This golden figurine of a snake can be activated by speaking its command word. The snake springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can strike venomously.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Jade Frog)
description: This jade figurine of a frog can be activated by speaking its command word. The frog springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 12, 27 Hit Points, and can swallow enemies whole.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Obsidian Leopard)
description: This obsidian figurine of a leopard can be activated by speaking its command word. The leopard springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can make deadly claw and bite attacks.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Onyx Dog)
description: This onyx figurine of a dog can be activated by speaking its command word. The dog springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 13, 26 Hit Points, and can track by scent.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ivory Serpent)
description: This ivory figurine of a serpent can be activated by speaking its command word. The serpent springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 13, 26 Hit Points, and can strike with venomous fangs.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Sapphire Blue Wolf)
description: This sapphire figurine of a wolf can be activated by speaking its command word. The wolf springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can make deadly bite attacks.

name: Flame Tongue
description: You can take a Bonus Action to cause the blade of this sword to emit a bright flame. While the sword is ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage to any target it hits. The flame lasts until you take a Bonus Action to extinguish it.
properties: Emit bright flame as Bonus Action

name: Folding Boat
description: This 4-foot-long model of a rowboat unfolds magically to become a full-sized vessel. It can hold up to 8 creatures and has a rowing speed of 3 miles per hour.
